_note: Auto-derived twice per weekly run from limitlesstcg.com/cards (EN) and /cards/jp (JP). EN and JP run on independent rotation cycles with different set codes — POR (Perfect Order, EN) is the international counterpart of M3 (Nihil Zero, JP); by the time POR shipped to EN on 2026-03-27, JP was already on M4 (Ninja Spinner, 2026-03-13). City League scrapers track jp_release_date; the EN-side scrapers track set_release_date and (for in-person majors) in_person_legal_date = release + lag_days. _pick_current_set() keeps these in sync without a human edit when the next set drops.
